title: Samut Sakhon Heavy Rain
lead: Samut Sakhon is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of +3.14. This is a critical weather event with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Samut Sakhon is causing significant disruptions. 
 The Z-Score of +3.14 indicates that this event is extremely rare and unusual. 
 The high humidity of 95% and low wind speed of 2.0 km/h are exacerbating the situation.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical weather event.
